heading: Returns relating to applicable insurance contracts in which certain exempt organizations hold interests
label: 6050V Returns relating to applicable insurance contracts in which certain exempt organizations hold interests

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Each applicable exempt organization which makes a reportable acquisition shall make the return described in subsection (c).

children.heading: Time for making return
children.label: b Time for making return
children.text: Any applicable exempt organization required to make a return under subsection (a) shall file such return at such time as may be established by the Secretary.

children.heading: Form and manner of returns
children.label: c Form and manner of returns

children.text: is in such form as the Secretary prescribes,
contains the name, address, and taxpayer identification number of the applicable exempt organization and the issuer of the applicable insurance contract, and
contains such other information as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.heading: Reportable acquisition
children.label: 1 Reportable acquisition
children.text: The term “reportable acquisition” means the acquisition by an applicable exempt organization of a direct or indirect interest in any applicable insurance contract in any case in which such acquisition is a part of a structured transaction involving a pool of such contracts.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “applicable insurance contract” means any life insurance, annuity, or endowment contract with respect to which both an applicable exempt organization and a person other than an applicable exempt organization have directly or indirectly held an interest in the contract (whether or not at the same time).

children.label: i
children.text: all persons directly or indirectly holding any interest in the contract (other than applicable exempt organizations) have an insurable interest in the insured under the contract independent of any interest of an applicable exempt organization in the contract,

children.label: ii
children.text: the sole interest in the contract of an applicable exempt organization or each person other than an applicable exempt organization is as a named beneficiary, or

children.label: I
children.text: as a beneficiary of a trust holding an interest in the contract, but only if the person’s designation as such beneficiary was made without consideration and solely on a purely gratuitous basis, or

children.label: II
children.text: as a trustee who holds an interest in the contract in a fiduciary capacity solely for the benefit of applicable exempt organizations or persons otherwise described in subclause (I) or clause (i) or (ii).

children.label: B
children.text: an organization described in section 168(h)(2)(A)(iv), or

children.label: C
children.text: an organization not described in paragraph (1) or (2) which is described in section 2055(a) or section 2522(a).

children.heading: Termination
children.label: e Termination
children.text: This section shall not apply to reportable acquisitions occurring after the date which is 2 years after the date of the enactment of this section.
